message:
test(fcp-manifest): add comprehensive connector manifest unit tests (flywheel_connectors-2145)

Add 40 new external tests covering:
- TOML parsing: missing/unknown fields, invalid syntax
- Field validation: connector_id, zones, approval modes, archetypes, risk levels
- Supply chain metadata: attestations, policy, trusted builders, SLSA levels
- Signatures: thresholds, duplicate KIDs
- Network constraints: CIDR deny, defaults, SNI requirement
- Interface hash: determinism, content changes, supply chain exclusion
- State models: stateless, singleton_writer
- Multiple operations with different risk levels

Makes parse_str_unchecked public for testing utilities.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
